top_tweets.text:
Agents make ugly UIs because they've never seen good design.

We've been fixing that,  2,000 DESIGN.md files from the world's best products, structured for a model to read and learn. Colors, type, spacing, layouts and more.

Free. https://t.co/mJaKNHba0O https://t.co/GkbyV1HMRQ
top_tweets.author: bbssppllvv
top_tweets.name: Mike Bespalov
top_tweets.summary_zh: 推出包含 2,000 個頂尖產品的 DESIGN.md 資料庫，讓 AI Agent 學習優秀設計系統（顏色、字型、間距、佈局等），解決 Agent 生成醜陋 UI 的問題，免費開放使用。

top_tweets.text: the whole "cannot use our models to develop a competing product" is getting really confusing now that model labs are launching regular products like Claude Design
top_tweets.author: thdxr
top_tweets.name: dax
top_tweets.summary_zh: 隨著模型廠商（如 Anthropic 推出 Claude Design）開始推出產品功能，「不得用我們模型開發競品」的授權條款變得越來越令人困惑，界線模糊。

top_tweets.text: Notice those suddenly quiet about GPT Images 2.0 and Claude Design this week, when last week it was basically the end of designers.
top_tweets.author: darylginn

top_tweets.text:
When you're writing code, you need to think about designing systems that are scalable and maintainable.

And inefficient software design can lead to issues like scope creep, miscommunication, delays, and so on.

In this guide, Soham teaches you Software Design basics along with https://t.co/MEFHrsjIA4

top_tweets.summary_zh: 撰寫程式時需思考可擴展與可維護的系統設計，低效設計會導致範疇蔓延、溝通不良與延遲；freeCodeCamp 推出軟體設計基礎指南教學。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
